title: kubeadm Configuration (v1beta3) — FileDiscovery
text:
Appears in:
Discovery
FileDiscovery is used to specify a file or URL to a kubeconfig file from which to load
cluster information.
Field
Description
kubeConfigPath
[Required]
string
kubeConfigPath
is used to specify the actual file path or URL to the kubeconfig
file from which to load cluster information.
kubeConfigPath
is used to specify the actual file path or URL to the kubeconfig
file from which to load cluster information.
